title: Unslab
description: Turn any Modded & Vanilla slabs back to full blocks with crafting!
body:
Transform modded and vanilla slabs back into full blocks with ease!

# > **If a slab is mapped to the wrong block, please report it on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/dooji2/unslab/issues).** ![Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/604e13c0bbb215b6cdf1284a1d7e748c3d4abc37_0.webp) [![Omnilib Badge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a685ead2dbd4fde1c93e6ee01ec6f35525610d12.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/omnilib) **Requires Fabric API and Omnilib. Also compatible with Forge and NeoForge, using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), requires [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api).** This mod provides a GUI interface where you can customize mappings - which for now doesn't work on servers. Therefore, for servers, Unslab is not required on the client. **Official Downloads**: - CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unslab - GitHub: https://github.com/dooji2/unslab - Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/unslab
